summary: First full backend + frontend test of the Lead CRM. All 21 pytest backend tests pass against the external preview URL. All requested frontend flows verified end-to-end: public contact form submission, admin login (success + wrong password), protected route redirect, dashboard stat cards / conversion / by-source / recent table, leads list with search/status/source filters, lead detail (status workflow, notes add/delete via API, follow-up schedule via shadcn calendar popover, clear follow-up), and logout. No critical or blocking bugs found.

minor.issue: Clearing follow_up_at is done by sending empty string "". Backend stores the empty string in DB rather than removing the field/setting null. Frontend treats falsy as 'Not set' so UI works, but `LeadUpdate.follow_up_at: Optional[str] = None` filtered with `v is not None` means there is no clean way to actually clear (set to null). Consider using a sentinel or accepting null and storing None.

issues: Sonner toasts at top-right overlap the 'Sign out' button in the admin header, occasionally blocking clicks immediately after status/follow-up updates. Consider relocating toaster or shortening duration.

action_items: (Optional) Allow null/clear for follow_up_at in PATCH /api/leads/{id} instead of storing an empty string.
(Optional) Move Sonner toaster position (e.g., bottom-right) so it does not overlap the header sign-out button.
(Optional) Hydration console warning from Emergent dev wrapper inserting <span> inside <option> in LeadsList — appears to come from the dev runtime, not source, but verify in production build.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: /api/leads/{id} update accepts empty string as a value, leading to ambiguous semantics for clearing follow_up_at.
Backend: lead_stats follow-up window uses ISO date string comparison which works only because follow_up_at is yyyy-MM-dd; document this invariant.
Frontend: LeadsList renders <option> labels via Babel transform that inserts a <span>, raising a React hydration warning. Likely tooling, but worth verifying with production build.
test_credentials: admin@crm.local / Admin@12345 (verified working, seeded on startup)
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed leads were created via the public endpoint during testing. They remain in MongoDB for further manual verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers auth, public leads, lead CRUD, stats, notes, delete, and logout — keep as regression suite. Frontend E2E used data-testids exactly as documented in the request. The shadcn calendar inside Popover renders day buttons inside [role='dialog'] with role='gridcell' — use that selector to click days. Avoid using [data-testid^="note-"] because it also matches the note-input textarea; instead scope by li[data-testid^="note-"] or use the exact uuid.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bugs were found. Only one ambiguity in follow-up clearing semantics noted as minor.
